title: Netflix Out as Investor in Meghan Markle Brand As Ever
summary: Netflix has stepped down as a backer in As ever, the lifestyle brand from Meghan, the Duchess of Sussex. As Ever was launched 11 months ago, with an inaugural collection of teas, jam, honey and baking mixes. It coincided with the launch of her Netflix series “With Love, Meghan,” where Markle welcom…

title: Tecno Pova Metal Tonino Lamborghini Edition hands-on
summary: Tecno has been expanding its reach outside of the budget realm for some time now, and it announced a strategic partnership with Italian luxury lifestyle brand Tonino Lamborghini at MWC.
